name: data-plane-contract
description: The Rust data-plane capability contract — the engine-agnosticism surface any data-plane layer-swap must preserve. Auth-light: hits the router directly (NEW=http://localhost:4011), so it works before the gateway key is provisioned. The engines[] matrix (per-engine read/write/aggregate/stream/transactions + cost model) is the parity-critical payload; volatile/deployment-specific router runtime fields are normalized out.
